archer.ability_desc: Fires 3 arrows at the closest enemy, each dealing 70% physical damage.
archer.description: A swift ranged attacker who fires volleys of arrows that reduce enemy armor.
archer.name: Archer
archer.passive_desc: Each arrow reduces the target's armor by 2 for 3.0 seconds. (Max 7 stacks)
archer.ultimate_desc: Channels for 1.5 seconds, shooting 5 arrows every 0.5s at the closest enemy dealing 40% physical damage each.

artillery.ability_desc: Explosive shell that deals 150% physical  damage, stuns for 0.5s, and knocks the target 1.0 tiles away.
artillery.description: A fragile slow backline siege unit that deals explosive damage to anything in its sights.
artillery.name: Artillery
artillery.passive_desc: Attacks and abilities deal additional 30% physical damage as splash in a 0.5 tile radius.
artillery.ultimate_desc: Fires a massive artillery shell for 330% with double splash radius.

berserker.ability_desc: Damages himself for 20% current HP, gains a 40% max HP shield, and gains 20% attack speed for 2.5s.
berserker.description: A savage warrior who thrives in the heat of battle, healing himself through sheer aggression.
berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.passive_desc: Has innate 10% lifesteal and permanent gains +5% lifesteal per takedown.
berserker.ultimate_desc: Unleashes a devastating strike for 400% true damage that applies lifesteal.

cleric.description: A dedicated holy healer who constantly heals her allies instead of attacking enemies.
cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.passive_desc: Can't attack, but gains 10 mana per second.
cleric.ultimate_desc: Heals all allies for 25% missing HP.

colossus.ability_desc: Taunts all targets in a 2.5 tile radius for 2.5s and deals 130% physical damage in a 1.0 tile radius.
colossus.description: A mountain of a tank with unmatched physical resistance and the ability to stun the entire battlefield.
colossus.name: Colossus
colossus.passive_desc: Reduces incoming damage by 10%. (Doesn't affect true damage)
colossus.ultimate_desc: Colossal impact in a 2.5 tile radius for 250% physical damage and a 2.0s stun.

disarmer.ability_desc: Disarms target for 1.5s and deals 150% physical damage.
disarmer.description: A weapon specialist who can disarm enemies and prevent them from attacking.
disarmer.name: Disarmer
disarmer.passive_desc: Attacking a disarmed target grants 25% increased attack speed for 3 seconds.
disarmer.ultimate_desc: Creates a weapon suppression field that disarms all enemies in 3.0 tile radius for 3.0s.

earthbender.ability_desc: Creates a tree tendril that roots the target for 2.0s and deals 130% magic damage.
earthbender.description: A master of earth manipulation who builds up his durability during combat and roots enemies in place to control the battlefield.
earthbender.name: Earthbender
earthbender.passive_desc: When taking damage, gain a stack of 5% armor and magic resist for 5.0s. (Max 12 stacks)
earthbender.ultimate_desc: Causes an earthquake in 3.0 tile radius that roots enemies for 3.5s and deals 200% magic damage.

frost_mage.ability_desc: Fires an ice bolt for 150% magic damage and slows target by 30% for 2.5s.
frost_mage.description: A cryomancer who controls ice and frost, slowing enemies with every attack and freezing them with powerful spells.
frost_mage.name: Frost Mage
frost_mage.passive_desc: Auto-attacks slow the target by 10% for 1.5s.
frost_mage.ultimate_desc: Creates a blizzard for 320% magic damage and slows all enemies in 2.5 tile radius by 50% for 4.0s.

guardian.ability_desc: Grants a 20% max HP shield to himself AND tand he closest ally. If alone, he gains a 40% max HP shield instead.
guardian.description: A hulking protector who uses heavy shields to shield his allies.
guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.passive_desc: Redirects 20% of damage taken by allies in a 2.0 tile radius.
guardian.ultimate_desc: Slams the ground for 300% physical damage and a 3.5s stun.

mirror_knight.ability_desc: Gains a 10% max HP shield and 25% reflect for 2.5s.
mirror_knight.description: A defensive warrior who reflects incoming damage back at attackers.
mirror_knight.name: Mirror Knight
mirror_knight.passive_desc: Reflects 10% of all damage taken back to attackers.
mirror_knight.ultimate_desc: Grants 50% reflect to all allies in 4.0 tile radius for 5.0s.

mistcaller.ability_desc: Heals a target for 15% of their maximum HP over 3s.
mistcaller.description: A restorative support who healls allies with enchanted mists through prolonged fights.
mistcaller.name: Mistcaller
mistcaller.passive_desc: All of Mistcaller's excess healing is converted to temporary maximum HP. Every 5s, heals all allies in a 3.0 tile radius for 5 + 5% missing HP over 3s.
mistcaller.ultimate_desc: Heals all allies in a 3.5 tile radius for 25% of their maximum HP over 3s. Excess healing is converted into temporary maximum HP.

monk.ability_desc: Precise strike for 160% physical damage that silences the target for 1.5s.
monk.description: A martial arts master who uses a flurry of strikes to incapacitate foes through precise pressure points.
monk.name: Monk
monk.passive_desc: Every 3rd attack stuns the target for 0.5s.
monk.ultimate_desc: Gains 25% max HP shield and reflects 75% of incoming damage for 5s.

necromancer.description: A dark sorcerer who commands the undead, summoning allies to fight for him.
necromancer.name: Necromancer

ninja.ability_desc: Dashes toward the target enemy. If reached, deal 150% physical damage and stun for 0.5s.
ninja.description: A high-mobility predator designed to dive the backline and execute wounded targets with lethal precision.
ninja.name: Ninja
ninja.passive_desc: Deals double damage to targets below 30% HP.
ninja.ultimate_desc: Executes a target with 900% physical damage.

oracle.ability_desc: Grants a shield worth 15% max HP to self or an ally.
oracle.description: A divine seer who manipulates fate through shields and mana restoration.
oracle.name: Oracle
oracle.passive_desc: Gains an additional 5 mana after each auto-attack.
oracle.ultimate_desc: Restores 35% max HP and grants a shield worth 35% max HP.

paladin.ability_desc: Heals self for 20% max HP. [MAKE MORE INTERESTING]
paladin.description: A holy knight who balances immense durability with powerful self-healing and divine judgment.
paladin.name: Paladin
paladin.ultimate_desc: Heals self for 40% max HP and deals 200% true damage. [MAKE MORE INTERESTING]

rogue.description: A nimble backline specialist who strikes with precision and vanishes before being targeted.
rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.passive_desc: 25% chance to dodge incoming auto attacks.
rogue.ultimate_desc: Lethal execution dealing 600% physical damage. [MAKE MORE INTERESTING]

silencer.ability_desc: Strikes target for 130% physical damage and silences for 3.5s.
silencer.description: A magical assassin who specializes in silencing mages and disrupting spellcasters.
silencer.name: Silencer
silencer.passive_desc: Deals 25% bonus damage to silenced targets.
silencer.ultimate_desc: Creates a silence zone for 340% physical damage, silencing all enemies in 3.5 tile radius for 6.0s.

siren.description: A captivating support who lures enemies into stuns and drains their mana with every haunting song.
siren.name: Siren
siren.passive_desc: Auto-attacks drain 5 mana from the target.
siren.ultimate_desc: Shrieks for 280% magic damage and stunning for 1.0s.

sniper.ability_desc: High-precision strike for 150% physical damage. [MAKE MORE INTERESTING]
sniper.description: An elite marksman specializing in devastating single-target shots.
sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.passive_desc: Deals 30% bonus damage to targets at least 2.0 tiles away.
sniper.ultimate_desc: Lethal long-range shot for 350% physical damage. [MAKE MORE INTERESTING]

swordsman.ability_desc: Deals 120% physical damage and applies a bleed that deals 250% physical damage as a bleed over 3s.
swordsman.description: A skilled duelist who grows more dangerous as he fights, excelling in prolonged combats.
swordsman.name: Swordsman
swordsman.passive_desc: Gains 2 attack damage for 3s after each auto-attack. (Max 7 stacks)
swordsman.ultimate_desc: Deals 250% physical damage. Consumes all passive stacks to increase the damage by 50% per stack. If it kills the target, gain full passive stacks.

valkyrie.ability_desc: Cleaves enemies in a 150 degree cone within 0.75 tiles for 150% physical damage and a 0.5s stun.
valkyrie.description: A formidable bruiser who wildly slashes through foes with her massive axe.
valkyrie.name: Valkyrie
valkyrie.passive_desc: Auto attacks deal an additional 7 physical damage in a 0.75 tile radius and heal for 100% of the damage dealt.
valkyrie.ultimate_desc: Hits enemies in a 2.0 tile radius for 15% max HP physical damage and shields for 200% of the damage dealt.

warlock.ability_desc: Channels for 3s. Every 0.5s deals 50% magic damage in a 1.5 tile radius and heals for 25% of damage dealt. At the end, explodes in a 3.0 tile radius for 50% of the total damage dealt and heals for the same amount.
warlock.description: A melee sorcerer who siphons the life force of his enemies to sustain himself.
warlock.name: Warlock
warlock.passive_desc: Gains permanent max HP equal to 50% of self healing.

windcaller.ability_desc: Blasts a target with wind for 120% magic damage, knocking them back 1.0 tiles and slowing them by 20% for 1.5s.
windcaller.description: An air elemental who controls winds to push enemies away and control battlefield positioning.
windcaller.name: Windcaller
windcaller.passive_desc: Gaisn a 10% max hp shield after knocking back enemies.
windcaller.ultimate_desc: Creates a tornado for 250% magic damage, knocking back all enemies in a 3.5 tile radius by 2.5 tiles.

wizard.ability_desc: Fires a magical projectile dealing 150% magic damage.
wizard.description: A powerful spellcaster with a deep mana pool, capable of unleashing frequent bursts of magic damage.
wizard.name: Wizard
wizard.ultimate_desc: Calls down a meteor for 500% magic damage.

wraith.ability_desc: Deals 150% magic damage and a 1.0s disarm.
wraith.description: A terrifying spectral assassin that stuns its prey and moves faster than the eye can see.
wraith.name: Wraith
wraith.ultimate_desc: Deals 250% magic damage and 1.5s stun. [MAKE MORE INTERESTING]
